title: selaginella hyalogramma
intro: Selaginella hyalogramma, also known as the "Fairy Thread Moss" or "Thread Fern", is a species of evergreen, terrestrial plant that belongs to the Selaginellaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its potential medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, such as reducing stress and anxiety, improving cardiovascular health, and possessing antimicrobial properties. Selaginella hyalogramma can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or capsule, and is often used in traditional remedies in certain parts of the world.
